history.note: OpenAI provider research approved. Output: research/2026-06-29-openai-provider-research.md. Four forks locked in decisions.md: Chat Completions API (not Responses), tool-result errors ride in content string (drop is_error), default maxRetries=3 (match Anthropic), expose baseURL (Azure AzureOpenAI out of scope).

Engineering spec approved: engineering/2026-06-29-openai-provider-engineering.md. Modules: new providers/openai.ts + openai-mapper.ts + tests; edits to package.json (optional openai peer dep + ./providers/openai sub-path) and tsup.config.ts; index.ts unchanged. Raw-chunk streaming, flush-at-stream-end accumulator keyed on tool_calls[].index, four request transforms, max_completion_tokens. Two more decisions locked: system role for all models; maxTokens default 32000. Residual #3 (openai peer-dep version range) deferred to implement time.

Plan approved: plan/implementation-plan.md + 2 task briefs. task-01-openai-mapper (mapper in isolation, fixture tests) → task-02-openai-provider-and-packaging (provider class + package.json peer-dep/export + tsup entry, mock-SDK tests). Planner flagged openai is 6.x not 4.x (pin ^6.0.0 at implement) and that chat.completions.create is Promise-returning (must await before iterating).
